Start now Free Start now Pro Start now Team Start now Enterprise Contact us Interfaces. Vibe on web Vibe in your browser: run long-horizon work and code tasks from a chat interface. Vibe CLI Terminal-native coding agent powered by Devstral for autonomous software engineering tasks. Vibe for IDE VS Code and JetBrains plugin powered by Devstral—tab completion, natural language code editing, and context-aware chat. Vibe on mobile (iOS and Android) Features and tools. Messages Chat with our most powerful, SOTA models. Up to 6x free Up to 6x free Voice mode Record or upload audio, get transcriptions, ask questions, or generate summaries. Skills Create and load instructions, tools, and scripts for specialized, repeatable tasks. Web searches Up to 5x free Up to 5x free Libraries and document upload Organize and include information for your chats. Supported file formats: PDF, images, CSV, all text files (.json...), Office Suite (ppt, xls, docx). Limited Up to 15GB Up to 30GB / user Task scheduling Schedule prompts, agents, or workflows to run automatically at set times. Up to 5 Unlimited (Subject to fair usage limits and Mistral's Terms of Service.) Unlimited (Subject to fair usage limits and Mistral's Terms of Service.) Workflows Run multi-step automations orchestrated from Mistral Studio. Connectors (beta) Search, summarize, and act across your stack with the widest enterprise-ready connector directory. Custom MCP connectors (beta) Connect to any remote MCP server of choice. Canvas Create documents, presentations, code, mockups, and more. Project folders Group chats into organized, context-rich workspaces. Up to 1,000 Up to 1,000 Image generation Generate and edit high-quality AI images, turning ideas into visuals with just a few words. Up to 40x free Up to 40x free Code interpreter (Chat mode) Execute code in a sandbox, run scientific analysis, generate visualizations, and perform simulations. Verified news Fetch reliable and verified news content in responses. Coding features. Use Vibe in the CLI, IDE, and remotely. Connectors Pull context from your tools like Notion, Slack, Linear, and Drive directly into Vibe CLI while it codes. Hooks Run custom shell commands before and after each agent turn to enforce conventions, block patterns, or trigger your own automations. Remote coding agents Remote coding agent in isolated sandboxes for parallel task execution. Teleport Hand off a Vibe CLI session from your local machine to a remote coding agent , then pick it back up locally when needed. Remote agent observability Monitor remote coding sessions with run history, tool calls, code changes, logs, and audit trails. Domain name verification Team and enterprise features. Knowledge connectors Connect external knowledge sources to Vibe for real-time, accurate answers. Custom deployments Deploy self-hosted, in your private cloud, or on-premises; your data stays in your environment. Admin API Programmatically manage users, teams, and permissions. Data export Audit logs Detailed logs for tracking usage, changes, and ensuring compliance. SAML SSO White label Dedicated hostname, your logo. Usage and data. Extend usage with PAYG credits Keep going past your plan limit by paying only for what you use beyond it at API rate. Model training Opt-out Opt-out Opt-out Customer service. Help center Chat and email support Frequently asked questions. Does Mistral have a free plan? Yes. Mistral Free provides limited access to Vibe , including our latest models, chat, search, creation, and Vibe for code for agentic coding in your terminal. Which model should I use? For most tasks: Mistral Large (best overall performance). For coding: Mistral Medium 3.5. For document extraction: OCR . For cost-sensitive projects: Mistral Small . For more information, see the Models overview documentation . How is API pricing calculated? We charge per million tokens processed - both input (your prompts) and output (responses) count.
